name: sleuth
summary: Read-only remote forensic incident response over SIREN, building ATT&CK attack chains and producing Chinese Markdown IR reports.
notes: Risk class is governed (public distribution, remote execution via SIREN, false-attribution risk). Maturity declared production until the deferred governed-release gates (trust report, runtime permission probes, Review Studio) are added; governance_score is 95/100 (governed band) per reports/governance_scorecard.json. Accepted warnings are tracked in reports/review_waivers.md; a real model-executed output cross-check is in reports/output_execution_runs.json.
